summary: Adjusted seam framing with minimal edits: rewrote the opening paragraph to start from surveillance/action context instead of a rain-first temporal scaffold overlapping Chapter 8, and added a single exit bridge line pointing to Ina's return to MiraeWave by noon.
edits: Rewrote opening paragraph to a distinct entry construction (door/surveillance-first) while preserving location, rain pressure, and tail-check information.
Removed immediate repetition of the half-latched-door signal in paragraph two after moving that signal into the new opening.
Added one pre-final sentence at chapter end to smooth handoff into Chapter 8's MiraeWave office opening.
